title: Create Limonata
description: A  modpack with create, some create addons, farmer's delight, etched, Axiom and some QOL
body:
![Logo of the modpack on which is written on the top row MINECRAFT and on the bottom row Create & Limonata](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5ac1add1cb71fcf30bbae6d4807381279380ca4.png)

## About:
This modpack was made for me and my friends to play on a custom neoforge server.

There are still  some issues i'm trying to solve :)) But generally it works 

The modpack features some Create addons as well as farmer's delight, Etched, Axiom, Distant Horizons, [Limonata](https://modrinth.com/mod/limonata), [Limonata Permits](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-limonata-permits), Simple Voicechat, Fusion and some connected resource packs, Sophisticated packpacks, A bunch of YUNG's Better structures, Journeymap, Vanilla Tweaks(Site linked below) and some optimization mods
## Create Mods:
- Crafts & Additions
- Encased
- Mechanical Extruder
- Bells & Whistles
- Connected
- Currency shops
- Design n'Decor
- Escalated
- Extra Gauges
- Framed
- Trimmed
- Rechiselled
- Power Loader
- Blocks & Bogies



## YUNG's Mods:
- Better Jungle Temples
- Better Ocean Monument
- Better Strongholds
- Better Witch huts
